description_long: This rifle features a modern, stylized design with a predominantly black, pink, and gray color scheme. The body is angular and geometric, with a prominent rectangular receiver and a detachable box magazine. The stock is skeletonized and extends straight back, while the barrel is long and capped with a large cylindrical suppressor. The grip and foregrip are both black, with colored accents at their bases. There are minimal external controls or attachments, and the sighting system appears to be integrated into the upper receiver without any visible optics or iron sights.
description: A modern, stylized rifle with a black, pink, and gray color scheme, featuring a skeletonized stock, long suppressed barrel, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the skeletonized stock, long suppressor, and colored accents on the grip and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cylindrical suppressor and the narrow profile of the rifle, with the stock and barrel aligned.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same features from the other side, including the magazine and colored details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the skeletonized stock and the alignment of the barrel and suppressor.
